items.name: Grey Ponytail
items.description: Achieve the perfect ponytail hairstyle with a voluminous, trendy look! Whether you love braided styles, dreads, or locs, this ponytail adds a chic, aesthetic touch to any outfit. Inspired by Y2K, preppy, and modern fashion, this style is easy to wear, stylish, and affordable. Secure it with a hair clip for a sleek or playful vibe, perfect for casual, sporty, or dressy looks! A cheap and trendy must-have for any hair collection!
